race.comment: THE MONA LISA (5) was ridden closer to the speed last start and ran a much better race, hanging on well for a close fourth over 1500m in a Hawkesbury Midway. On trial at this distance but she should run it out strongly. Good enough to take care of these on her day. OAKFIELD SATURN (2) was enormous first-up at Kembla then struggled in the Midway Final at Randwick during the Championships. Finding the line well in shorter races so this first crack at 1700m should hold no fears. MONKHANA (9) settled near the tail before catching the eye late over the mile at Gosford recently. Goes best for Anna Roper who is back aboard. The extra trip on a roomier track looks a nice set-up. AIX EN PROVENCE (1) has been about the money all prep. Down in class today and should be peaking at the fourth run back. CHANGE MY ADDRESS (10) was strong through the line when successful over 1500m at Newcastle last time. Looks ready for a first run beyond the mile.
